form.formComment: Won her last two including a strong win last start over 461m at Hobart by 4.5 lengths in a Grade 5. Looks well placed to make it three straight.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at Hobart when a 1.5 lengths third but did clock a decent 19.50 over the 340m journey. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.
